steps.title: Use the prism formula
steps.content:
For a triangular prism, the volume equals the area of the base times the height. The formula is $V=Bh$, where $B$ is the base area and $h$ is the prism height. Substitute the given volume and height.

$$315=B(9)$$

steps.title: Solve for base area
steps.content: Divide by $9$ to isolate $B$, since the question asks for the area of the base rather than a side length. $$B=\frac{315}{9}$$ $$B=35$$ The answer is 35.
